visuals.title: CFG Parse Tree Structure
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Context-Free Grammar and Parsing</text>
  
  <!-- CFG Production Rule -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    S → NP VP
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parse Tree -->
  <circle cx="250" cy="70" r="30" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="250" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    S
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Terminal Symbols -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="80" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    "the", "cat"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Non-Terminal Symbols -->
  <rect x="160" y="150" width="80" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    NP, VP
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parser -->
  <rect x="270" y="150" width="80" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parser
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Input String -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="120" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    "the cat sleeps"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parse Tree Output -->
  <rect x="250" y="220" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parse Tree
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <path d="M110 90 L110 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M200 90 L250 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M110 240 L110 270 L310 270 L310 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="110" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    CFG Production
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Parse Tree
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="90" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Terminal Symbols
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="200" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Non-Terminals
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Parser
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Input String
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Output
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
